zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnès de Longpont於大約1105年出生在多易傑斯 萊奇時，她的父親Godefroy Raymond de Muret Seigneur de Muret et de Samatan, Ecuyer47歲，母親Save de Besancon42歲。她和Gerard de Quierzy II le Vieux至少有2個兒子。她去世於1167年在法國皮卡迪艾斯隆朋特享年63歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Agnès
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnès de Longpont was born about 1105, in German Empire, her father, Godefroy Raymond de Muret Seigneur de Muret et de Samatan, Ecuyer, was 47 and her mother, Save de Besancon, was 42. She had at least 2 sons with Gerard de Quierzy II le Vieux. She died in 1167, in Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, France, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnès de Longpont est née environ 1105, à Deutsches Reich, son père, Godefroy Raymond de Muret Seigneur de Muret et de Samatan, Ecuyer, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Save de Besancon, avait 42 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Gerard de Quierzy II le Vieux. Elle est décédée en 1167, à Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnès de Longpont um 1105 in Deutsches Reich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Godefroy Raymond de Muret Seigneur de Muret et de Samatan, Ecuyer 47 und ihre Mutter Save de Besancon 42. Sie hatte mit Gerard de Quierzy II le Vieux mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1167 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Longpont è nata il circa 1105 nel Deutsches Reich, sua padre, Godefroy Raymond de Muret Seigneur de Muret et de Samatan, Ecuyer, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Save de Besancon, aveva 42 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Gerard de Quierzy II le Vieux. Morì nel 1167, nel Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnès de Longpontが約1105年にデウトシェス レイチで生まれた時，父Godefroy Raymond de Muret Seigneur de Muret et de Samatan, Ecuyerは47歳，母Save de Besanconは42歳であった。彼女はGerard de Quierzy II le Vieuxとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1167年にフランスピカーディエイスンロングプオントで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnès de Longpont(이)가 대략 1105년 데우츠체스 라이치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Godefroy Raymond de Muret Seigneur de Muret et de Samatan, Ecuyer(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Save de Besancon(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 Gerard de Quierzy II le Vieux(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1167년 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 론그폰트에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Longpont nasceu aproximadamente 1105, em Império Alemão, seu pai, Godefroy Raymond de Muret Seigneur de Muret et de Samatan, Ecuyer, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Save de Besancon, tinha 42 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Gerard de Quierzy II le Vieux. Ela faleceu em 1167, em Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, França, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnès de Longpont родилась около 1105 г. в местности деуцчесь раич, её отцу по имени Godefroy Raymond de Muret Seigneur de Muret et de Samatan, Ecuyer было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Save de Besancon, 42. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Gerard de Quierzy II le Vieux. Она умерла в 1167 г. в местности лонгпонт, эисн, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnès de Longpont nació aproximadamente 1105, en Deutsches Reich, su papá, Godefroy Raymond de Muret Seigneur de Muret et de Samatan, Ecuyer, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Save de Besancon, tenía 42 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Gerard de Quierzy II le Vieux. Murió en 1167, en Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 63 años.
